# Security Policy

## Supported versions

Security fixes are provided for the latest `1.x` release.

## Reporting a vulnerability

Report vulnerabilities through
[GitHub private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/visorcraft/onQ/security/advisories/new).
Do not disclose the issue in a public issue, discussion, or pull request.

Include the affected version, platform, reproduction steps, impact, and any
suggested mitigation. You should receive an initial response within seven days.

After a fix is available, the report may be published as a coordinated GitHub
security advisory with credit chosen by the reporter.
